notes: MA Form 1 fillable PDF downloaded from mass.gov DOR.
Widget names are long descriptive strings matching the form labels.
Filing status is a radio group (line 1 filing status) with 4 options on page 1.
Page 1: header, exemptions, signature. Page 2: income lines 3-23. Page 3: tax/credits lines 24-38. Page 4: payments/refund/due lines 39-55.
Only the most important income/tax/refund lines are mapped for the initial render.

taxpayer_first_name.note: Taxpayer first name (page 1 header; also on pages 2-4)

taxpayer_ssn.note: Taxpayer SSN (page 1 header; also on pages 2-4)

mailing_address.widget_name: Mailing address (no. & street; apt./suite/postal box). If you have a foreign address, also complete line below
mailing_address.terminal_name: Mailing address (no. & street; apt./suite/postal box). If you have a foreign address, also complete line below

line_2a_personal_exemption.widget_name: line 2a Personal exemptions. Single/Married filing separately ($4,400), Head of household ($6,800), Married filing jointly ($8,800)
line_2a_personal_exemption.terminal_name: line 2a Personal exemptions. Single/Married filing separately ($4,400), Head of household ($6,800), Married filing jointly ($8,800)

line_2g_total_exemptions.widget_name: line 2g. Total exemptions. Add lines 2a through 2f. Enter here and on line 18
line_2g_total_exemptions.terminal_name: line 2g. Total exemptions. Add lines 2a through 2f. Enter here and on line 18

line_3_wages.widget_name: line 3. Wages, salaries, tips and other employee compensation (from all Forms W-2)
line_3_wages.terminal_name: line 3. Wages, salaries, tips and other employee compensation (from all Forms W-2)

line_6a_business_income.widget_name: line 6a. Business/profession income or loss. Enclose Schedule C
line_6a_business_income.terminal_name: line 6a. Business/profession income or loss. Enclose Schedule C
line_6a_business_income.note: Line 6a: business income from Schedule C

line_10_total_5pct_income.widget_name: line 10. Total 5.0% income. Add lines 3 through 9. Be sure to subtract any losses in lines 6 or 7
line_10_total_5pct_income.terminal_name: line 10. Total 5.0% income. Add lines 3 through 9. Be sure to subtract any losses in lines 6 or 7

line_16_total_deductions.widget_name: line 16. Total deductions. Add lines 11 through 15
line_16_total_deductions.terminal_name: line 16. Total deductions. Add lines 11 through 15

line_17_income_after_deductions.widget_name: line 17. 5.0% Income after deductions. Subtract line 16 from line 10. Not less than 0
line_17_income_after_deductions.terminal_name: line 17. 5.0% Income after deductions. Subtract line 16 from line 10. Not less than 0

line_18_exemption_amount.note: Line 18: total exemption amount from page 1

line_19_income_after_exemptions.widget_name: line 19. 5.0% Income After Exemptions. Subtract line 18 from line 17. Not less than 0. If line 17 is less than line 18, see instructions
line_19_income_after_exemptions.terminal_name: line 19. 5.0% Income After Exemptions. Subtract line 18 from line 17. Not less than 0. If line 17 is less than line 18, see instructions

line_21_total_taxable_5pct.widget_name: line 21. Total Taxable 5.0% Income. Add lines 19 and 20
line_21_total_taxable_5pct.terminal_name: line 21. Total Taxable 5.0% Income. Add lines 19 and 20

line_22_tax_on_5pct_income.widget_name: line 22. Tax On 5.0% Income (from tax table). If line 21 is more than $24,000, multiply by .05
line_22_tax_on_5pct_income.terminal_name: line 22. Tax On 5.0% Income (from tax table). If line 21 is more than $24,000, multiply by .05

line_28a_income_tax.widget_name: line 28a. Income tax. Add lines 22 through 26
line_28a_income_tax.terminal_name: line 28a. Income tax. Add lines 22 through 26

line_28_total_tax.widget_name: line 28. Total tax. Add lines 28a and 28b
line_28_total_tax.terminal_name: line 28. Total tax. Add lines 28a and 28b

line_32_tax_after_credits.widget_name: line 32. Income Tax After Credits. Subtract total of lines 29 through 31 from line 28. Not less than 0
line_32_tax_after_credits.terminal_name: line 32. Income Tax After Credits. Subtract total of lines 29 through 31 from line 28. Not less than 0

line_37_tax_after_additions.widget_name: line 37. Income Tax After Credits, Contributions, Use Tax And Hc Penalty. Add lines 32 through 36
line_37_tax_after_additions.terminal_name: line 37. Income Tax After Credits, Contributions, Use Tax And Hc Penalty. Add lines 32 through 36

line_38a_w2_withholding.widget_name: Line 38a. Massachusetts income tax withheld from Form(s) W-2
line_38a_w2_withholding.terminal_name: Line 38a. Massachusetts income tax withheld from Form(s) W-2
line_38a_w2_withholding.note: Line 38a: MA income tax withheld from W-2

line_38_total_withholding.widget_name: Line 38. Total Massachusetts income tax withheld. Add lines 38a through 38c
line_38_total_withholding.terminal_name: Line 38. Total Massachusetts income tax withheld. Add lines 38a through 38c

line_48_total_refundable_credits.widget_name: line 48. Total Refundable Credits. Add lines 43 through 47
line_48_total_refundable_credits.terminal_name: line 48. Total Refundable Credits. Add lines 43 through 47

line_51_total_payments.widget_name: line 51. Total. Add lines 38 through 42 and lines 48 through 50
line_51_total_payments.terminal_name: line 51. Total. Add lines 38 through 42 and lines 48 through 50

line_52_overpayment.widget_name: line 52. Overpayment. If line 37 is smaller than line 51, subtract line 37 from line 51. If line 37 is larger than line 51, go to line 55. If line 37 and line 51 are equal, enter 0 in line 54
line_52_overpayment.terminal_name: line 52. Overpayment. If line 37 is smaller than line 51, subtract line 37 from line 51. If line 37 is larger than line 51, go to line 55. If line 37 and line 51 are equal, enter 0 in line 54

line_54_refund.widget_name: line 54. This Is Your Refund. Subtract line 53 from line 52. Mail to: Massachusetts DOR, PO Box 7000, Boston, MA 02204
line_54_refund.terminal_name: line 54. This Is Your Refund. Subtract line 53 from line 52. Mail to: Massachusetts DOR, PO Box 7000, Boston, MA 02204

line_55_tax_due.widget_name: line 55. Tax Due. Subtract line 51 from line 37. Pay in full online at mass.gov/masstaxconnect
line_55_tax_due.terminal_name: line 55. Tax Due. Subtract line 51 from line 37. Pay in full online at mass.gov/masstaxconnect
